title: numbox~

messages.description: input when monitoring or generated values instead

flags.name: -load <float>
flags.description: sets initialization and generating value with given float or sets current value if no float is given.

flags.name: -bgcolor <f, f, f>
flags.description:
sets background color in RGB
default: 255 255 255

flags.name: -fgcolor <f, f, f>
flags.description:
sets frontground color in RGB
default: 0 0 0

flags.name: -ramp <float>
flags.description:
sets ramp time in ms (minimum 0)
default: 10

flags.name: -rate <float>
flags.description:
sets refresh rate in ms (minimum 15)
default: 100

methods.description: sets initialization and generating value with given float or sets current value if no float is given
sets minimum and maximum dragging values

body: [numbox~] is a signal GUI number box. It can be used to display/monitor signal values at a fixed rate or generate them with a ramp time.
